prompt:
A small paper seed packet with a simple lettuce icon lies on a work surface, partly opened to reveal a small pile of tiny, light-brown lettuce seeds spilled out in front of it. The packet design is minimal and text-free, clearly suggesting it contains seeds for crisp hydroponic lettuce rather than generic garden greens. Beside the packet is a shallow tray with rockwool plugs or seedling cubes, ready to receive the seeds for germination.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk grow prep area with soft, even lighting, organized trays and nutrient bottles in the background, and a few healthy hydroponic plants already thriving under LED lights. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or readable text on the packet, and a composition that centers the seeds, packet, and nearby tray while the rest of the environment remains softly out of focus, emphasizing the start of a hydroponic lettuce cycle.
